result.sentence: In the game BitLife, you can start with the right attributes by aiming for 90%+ Looks from birth or boosting it later.
In the game BitLife, you can boost Looks through plastic surgery, being careful with risky surgeons early on.
In the game BitLife, you can boost Looks through salon visits, makeup, or hair changes.
In the game BitLife, you can boost Looks through gym and healthy living choices.
In the game BitLife, you can maintain high Health by avoiding drugs, excessive alcohol, and risky choices.
In the game BitLife, you can graduate from high school before starting professional modeling gigs.
In the game BitLife, you can ensure you are 18+ years old to start professional modeling gigs.
In the game BitLife, you can keep Looks high during teen years.
In the game BitLife, you can apply for the Foot Model job at age 18 by going to Jobs → Special Careers → Actor/Modeling.
In the game BitLife, you can age up and check again if the Foot Model option does not appear.
In the game BitLife, you can work hard as a Foot Model to build experience.
In the game BitLife, you can post on social media regularly to grow followers.
In the game BitLife, you can do photo shoots when offered.
In the game BitLife, you can do commercials when offered.
In the game BitLife, you can do runway events when offered.
In the game BitLife, you can always choose activities that increase public exposure.
In the game BitLife, you can unlock Catalog Model or Runway Model roles after gaining some experience as a Foot Model.
In the game BitLife, you can keep applying through Jobs → Special Careers → Model until accepted.
In the game BitLife, you can hire an agent once you are a Famous Model by going to the Fame menu.
In the game BitLife, agents bring elite gigs such as high-paying fashion campaigns and magazine covers.
In the game BitLife, elite gigs often require very high Looks (95%+).
In the game BitLife, you can accept audition opportunities offered by your agent for luxury brands or runway shows.
In the game BitLife, you can always say Yes to auditions, even if you think you might fail.
In the game BitLife, you can increase your success rate in auditions by maintaining high Looks and Fame.
In the game BitLife, you can work hard each year to improve performance.
In the game BitLife, you can avoid taking too many years off to prevent fame and income loss.
In the game BitLife, you can continue boosting Looks with surgery or cosmetic care if they drop.
In the game BitLife, you can write books once your Fame is full.
In the game BitLife, you can do TV talk shows once your Fame is full.
In the game BitLife, you can get sponsorship deals once your Fame is full.
In the game BitLife, writing books, doing TV talk shows, and getting sponsorship deals boost income and open elite opportunities.
In the game BitLife, you can retire gracefully by saving money and considering branching into other celebrity roles.
In the game BitLife, models can work for many years, but Fame drops after retirement unless you pivot to other fame-based careers such as acting or influencer.
In the game BitLife, a min-max strategy to become a famous model as early as age 18 without failed auditions is available upon request.
